text_original: My account kinda bug (already tested out on another account) , seems like I need to use coins to be able to chat, even though I'm already paid for a subscription to get unlimited chat.
text_zh: 我的账号好像出bug了（已经在另一个账号上测试过了），似乎我需要用金币才能聊天，尽管我明明已经付费订阅了无限聊天。
reply_original:
Hi there, I am truly sorry for the trouble! Let's fix this immediately. Please email support@fantachat.ai with:
1. Your UID (bottom of Settings).
2. Your Google purchase email.
3. A screenshot of your Google Play receipt (showing the GPA order ID).
Once received, we will manually restore your VIP status right away!
reply_zh:
您好，非常抱歉给您带来不便！我们会立即为您解决这个问题。请发送邮件至 support@fantachat.ai，并提供以下信息：
1. 您的 UID（位于“设置”底部）。
2. 您的 Google 购买邮箱。
3. 您的 Google Play 收据截图（需显示 GPA 订单号）。
收到后，我们将立即为您手动恢复 VIP 权益！
